title: erica cymosa subsp. cymosa
intro: Erica cymosa subsp. cymosa, also known as the alpine heath, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erica cymosa subsp. cymosa include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Erica cymosa subsp. cymosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal remedies and supplements.
